Finally she pushes herself up, rubbing her wrists before walking to stand before her wife.

\n\nThe strength-sapped red myr stirs at the presence, eyes fluttering and lips curving into a smile. The unorthodox pair share a single, simple kiss before the curvy honeypot returns her attention to you.
